FINDING: widget.py:349:BLOCKING
WHAT: session.commit before response serialization risks stale-token window on network failure
EVIDENCE: widget.py:349
IMPACT: client retains stale token after network error
OPTIONS:
1. move commit after response
DIFF_LINE: +  session.commit()
REACHABLE_PATH: rotate_token:347 is the only writer; grep shows no other commit point in this flow
REJECTED_ALTERNATIVE: commit-after-response loses rotated tokens if response succeeds but commit fails — strictly worse failure mode
UNVERIFIABLE: no
